> [!IMPORTANT]
> **Pull requests are not reviewed on this repository.**
>
> serai is a one-person hobby project. The maintainer's stance is in [CONTRIBUTING.md → Why pull requests are disabled](../blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#why-pull-requests-are-disabled).
>
> If you'd like a feature or have spotted a bug, please file an [issue](../issues/new/choose) instead. If the answer to "will the maintainer build this?" is no, **fork the repo and ship your own version** — the MIT license has you covered, and that's the recommended path.
>
> This PR will most likely be closed without review. Please don't take that personally.

-->
